CONTENT.Club career: Zanellato is a Milan's youth academy graduate. He received his first-ever call-up to the senior team from the head coach Vincenzo Montella ahead of the away Serie A game against Cagliari played on 28 May 2017; he, however, remained an unused substitute. He made his UEFA Europa League debut on 24 August 2017 against KF Shkëndija, playing the entire game as Milan won 1–0.On 30 January 2018, he was signed by Crotone on a six-months loan with an obligation to buy.On 29 January 2022, he signed with SPAL until 30 June 2024.On 1 February 2024, Zanellato returned to Crotone on loan.
CONTENT.International career: He made his debut with the Italy U21 on 6 September 2019, in a friendly match won 4–0 against Moldova.

SUMMARY: Niccoló Zanellato (born 24 June 1998) is an Italian footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie C Group C club Catania.
